author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Ritual - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR

QUESTIONS ON RITUAL AND CEREMONY IN THE ORDER
[Women's Order Convention 1987]
Contents
1 Consecration of rupas, thangkas etc.
5 Psychometry
Bhante's malas and frequently chanted mantras
6 More social ritual in the FWBO
Name giving ceremonies
Initiation into adulthood?
7 Suggestions for more ceremony - new community members, new chairmen etc.
9 Communities formed just the purpose of rituals?
Ritual retreats
Water bowls on shrines
Doing visualisation meditations collectively out loud?
10 Trying not to always have pujas at the very end of the day
The correct way to keep water bowls on a shrine
14 Ritual etiquette. Why a Buddha image is not garlanded
16 Extended periods of chanting
18 The Tibetan Oracle
Rocking in meditation
19 Infantile behaviour in adults
20 The Buddhist flag
21 Offering goddesses in pujas
22 Rituals performed by Dhardo Rimpoche
23 Not to 'Plonk'!
24 Chanting and singing
